Log.Location: "San Jacinto Ridge Truck Trl / Indian Creek Truck Trl"

details.IncidentDetail: "[9] PER S3 START FIRE AS A PRECAUTION - CHP IS EXTENDED"
"[4] NEG INJ "
"[3] PTYS CLIMBED OO VEH AND CLIMBED UP THE HILL "
"[2] VEH FLIPPED ON ITS ROOF "
"[29] 1039 TEHACHAPI HOSP [Shared]"
"[28] 59-S3 98 FROM SCSENE WILL CIRCULATE AREA - REQ 1039 TEHACHAPI HOSP AND HAVE THEM ADV ANY WALK INS FROM A TC [Shared]"
"[22] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 CASTRO TOW 661-641-4264 // ENRT DRIVE TIME FROM MOJAVE [Shared]"
"[19] [Rotation Request Comment] 1021 AV TOW // STRAIGHT TO VM [Shared]"
"[18] 59-S3 REQ 1185 FOR VEH APROX 40 FT OFF RDWY [Shared]"
"[16] KCFD IS 1097 WITH THE OTHER VEH THAT IS 300 YDS OFF THE HIGHWAY // VEH IS 1124 // FIRE IS SEARCHING THE AREA NOW [Shared]"
"[15] 59-S3 INQ W/ FIRE IF THEY HAVE A VUSIAL OF SENCOND HALF OR IF MADE CONTACT W/ PTY [Shared]"
"[14] 59-S3 HAS VISUAL OF FIRE OUT WITH BIG RIG NOW 1 MILE W OF 202 WILL TURN AROUND AT BROOME [Shared]"
"[10] [Appended, 22:46:55] [2] VEH OVER THE SIDE IS POSSIBLY A RED SD"
"[9] [Appended, 22:46:55] [1] RP HAD VISUAL OF THE SEMI TRUCK ON RHS WITH THEIR HAZARDS ON AND THE DRIVER LOOKING OVER THE SIDE "
"[5] VEH WENT DOWN THE EMABNKMENT // RP CAN NOT SEE IT"
"[3] RP NEG INJURIES POSS INJURIES IN THE OTHER VEH "
"[2] THE SD CUT OFF THE SEMI TRUCK THEN WENT DOWN THE EMBANKMENT "
"[1] RP IN A SEMI TRUCK VS UNK TYPE SD"
"[9] SR108 (SONORA PASS) - WINTER CLOSURE "
"[8] SR270 (BODIE RD) - WINTER CLOSURE "
"[7] SR120W (TIOGA PASS) - WINTER CLOSURE "
"[6] SR120E (MONO MILLS) - WINTER CLOSURE "
"[5] CRESTVIEW REST AREA - WINTER CLOSURE "
"[4] SR203 (REDS MEADOW) - WINTER CLOSURE "
"[3] SR168 (ASPENDELL) - WINTER CLOSURE "
"[2] REDROCK RANDSBURG RD - CLOSED FROM SR14 TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE "
"[1] GARLOCK RD - ROADWAY CLOSED TO THROUGHT TRAFFIC FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 // RESIDENTIAL ACCESS IS PERMITTED"
"[1] ^CT ADVS SIGNALS ON FLASH DUE TO CONST TIL 0500"
"[1] ^CT ADV SIGNAL WILL BE ON FLASH TILL 0400 HRS. DUE TO CONST"
